ValidationRule.description: Please enter the competitor lost to.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Rules_Execution__c.Run__c, AND(ISPICKVAL( StageName, "Closed Lost"), ISPICKVAL( PKI_GBL_Competitor_Lost_To__c ,""), Owner.ProfileId = '00e30000000tfcwAAA') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_010: Please enter the competitor lost to.
